name: delivery-workflow
description: Platform-neutral delivery Workflow Worker and multi-agent orchestration for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run file-based delivery workflows with gates, workers, and agents.
interface.longDescription: A platform-neutral software delivery workflow worker. It keeps workflow state in SQLite, stores artifacts on disk, separates interactive gates, automated work, and notifications, and exposes CLI/MCP tools for Codex-first orchestration.
